name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: Eiichi Enomoto
bio: For me, the pursuit of wisdom is a sacred trust. I believe that our knowledge should be used to heal the world and bring people together. We must cultivate compassion and understanding in all our pursuits.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である (ends with a soothing tone)
